channel.title: InYourBones Daily Music News
channel.description: Top 5 daily music stories handpicked by InYourBones

item.title: Olivia Rodrigo Performs New Track ‘begged’ in ‘SNL’ Hosting Debut
item.description: 🎤 Olivia Rodrigo rocked the stage with 'begged' on SNL! 🌟 Who else is loving her new track? #OliviaRodrigo #SNLPerformance 🎶

item.title: Gracie Abrams Announces New Song ‘Hit the Wall’
item.description: New vibes incoming! 🎶 Gracie Abrams drops 'Hit the Wall' - get ready to groove! 🔥 #NewMusicAlert

item.title: Charli xcx Shares ‘Rock Music’ Song Teaser, Says She’s Not Making a Rock Album
item.description: 🤘 Charli xcx is shaking things up with a 'Rock Music' teaser 🎸 Who's ready for this new sound? 🎶 #CharliXCX #MusicNews

item.title: BTS at Stanford Stadium: How to Get Last-Minute Tickets
item.description: 🚀 Score last-minute tix to the epic BTS show at Stanford Stadium! Don't miss out on this K-pop extravaganza! 🎶 #BTS #StanfordStadium #KpopFever

item.title: Wheel Of Fortune Announces New Action Bronson Album Planet Frog Out Next Week
item.description: 🐸🌟 Get ready to hop into action! @ActionBronson's new album Planet Frog drops next week! Let's vibe together! 🎶 #NewMusicAlert
